nodes.label: AbsPoint
nodes.summary: AbsPoint is a structural XML sub-element. It commonly appears under Anchor and Size.

nodes.label: Anchor
nodes.summary: Anchor is a structural XML sub-element. It commonly appears under Anchors. It is typically used to organize structural children such as AbsPoint.

nodes.label: Anchors
nodes.summary: Anchors is a structural XML sub-element. It commonly appears under Button and DynamicImage. It is typically used to organize structural children such as Anchor.

nodes.label: Assets
nodes.summary: Assets is a container-style XML element. It is typically used to host named child elements such as Texture.

nodes.label: BottomCenter
nodes.summary: BottomCenter is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: BottomLeft
nodes.summary: BottomLeft is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: BottomRight
nodes.summary: BottomRight is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under Sizes and TexCoords.

nodes.label: Button
nodes.summary: Button is an interactive XML control used for click and mouse-driven callbacks. It usually binds input events to Lua handler functions.

nodes.label: Color
nodes.summary: Color is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under Label.

nodes.label: Disabled
nodes.summary: Disabled is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: DynamicImage
nodes.summary: DynamicImage is an interactive XML control. It commonly appears under Button and Window. It is typically used to organize structural children such as Anchors, EventHandlers, Size and bind XML events like OnLButtonUp, OnRButtonUp to Lua.

nodes.label: EventHandler
nodes.summary: EventHandler is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under EventHandlers.

nodes.label: EventHandlers
nodes.summary: EventHandlers is a structural XML sub-element. It commonly appears under Button and DynamicImage. It is typically used to organize structural children such as EventHandler.

nodes.label: FullResizeImage
nodes.summary: FullResizeImage is a container-style XML element. It commonly appears under Window. It is typically used to organize structural children such as Anchors, Size, Sizes.

nodes.label: Label
nodes.summary: Label is a display-focused XML element used to present text content in UI layouts. It commonly appears inside container elements such as Window.

nodes.label: ListBox
nodes.summary: ListBox is a container-style XML element for row-based UI lists. It commonly works with structural children such as ListData and ListColumns and binds events to Lua callbacks.

nodes.label: ListColumn
nodes.summary: ListColumn is a structural XML sub-element that maps one list field to a target row child element. It commonly appears under ListColumns.

nodes.label: ListColumns
nodes.summary: ListColumns is a structural XML container that declares list column mappings. It commonly appears under ListBox and contains ListColumn entries.

nodes.label: ListData
nodes.summary: ListData is a structural XML sub-element that binds list controls to Lua-backed row data. It commonly appears under ListBox as list data wiring.

nodes.label: Middle
nodes.summary: Middle is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under Sizes.

nodes.label: MiddleCenter
nodes.summary: MiddleCenter is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: MiddleLeft
nodes.summary: MiddleLeft is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: MiddleRight
nodes.summary: MiddleRight is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: Normal
nodes.summary: Normal is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: NormalHighlit
nodes.summary: NormalHighlit is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: Pressed
nodes.summary: Pressed is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: Script
nodes.summary: Script is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under Scripts.

nodes.label: Scripts
nodes.summary: Scripts is an XML element type observed in contract artifacts, but structured evidence is currently sparse.

nodes.label: Size
nodes.summary: Size is a structural XML sub-element. It commonly appears under Button and DynamicImage. It is typically used to organize structural children such as AbsPoint.

nodes.label: Sizes
nodes.summary: Sizes is a structural XML sub-element. It commonly appears under FullResizeImage. It is typically used to organize structural children such as BottomRight, Middle, TopLeft.

nodes.label: TexCoords
nodes.summary: TexCoords is a structural XML sub-element. It commonly appears under Button and FullResizeImage. It is typically used to organize structural children such as BottomCenter, BottomLeft, BottomRight.

nodes.label: TextOffset
nodes.summary: TextOffset is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under Button.

nodes.label: Texture
nodes.summary: Texture is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under Assets.

nodes.label: TopCenter
nodes.summary: TopCenter is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: TopLeft
nodes.summary: TopLeft is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under Sizes and TexCoords.

nodes.label: TopRight
nodes.summary: TopRight is a XML UI element. It commonly appears under TexCoords.

nodes.label: Window
nodes.summary: Window is the primary XML container element for addon UI frames. It commonly hosts named child elements and binds lifecycle or input events to Lua handlers.

nodes.label: Windows
nodes.summary: Windows is a container-style XML element. It commonly appears under Button and DynamicImage. It is typically used to host named child elements such as Button, DynamicImage, FullResizeImage.
